title: デビュー戦の後に・ホープの始動

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki dazzles everyone with her performance
on the track. In the press conference afterward,
she declares her intention to become a Triple
Crown Champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is sent into an excited flurry by her
words. All are watching her expectantly as she
heads toward the Asahi Hai F.S.
